questions.question: Flink Agents (FLIP-531, 0.2.1 March 2026) — что это и чем отличается от ML_PREDICT?

options.text: Sub-project для event-driven AI agents на Flink runtime. Отличие от ML_PREDICT: agents — multi-step reasoning + actions (не single inference call), stateful conversation memory через Flink state, tool calls с EOS guarantees, multi-turn dialogues. Equivalent в Python — LangGraph, но с production-grade runtime (durability, EOS, autoscaling)

questions.explanation: ML_PREDICT — single function call (one inference). Agents — completely different abstraction: multi-step orchestration, agents make decisions, call tools, maintain conversation context, multi-turn dialogues. Под капотом — KeyedProcessFunction с ValueState<Conversation>, async LLM calls, async tool invocation. EOS critical: tool calls с side effects (Kafka publish, Stripe refund) выполняются ровно один раз через Flink 2PC. Не replacement для LangChain — production runtime для production-grade agents. Roadmap: 1.0 GA — Q4 2026 / Q1 2027.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок 09 — раздел 'Зачем нужна отдельная sub-project'

questions.question: EOS для tool calls в Flink Agents — почему критично и как реализовано?

options.text: Critical: tools могут иметь side effects (Stripe refund, Kafka publish, DB update). Без EOS retry после crash → double charge. Flink Agents используют 2PC: tool execution prepared → checkpoint → commit. Crash между prepare и commit — recovered transaction replays correctly, no duplicate. Tools должны support transactional semantics (Kafka yes, HTTP arbitrary — нет)

questions.explanation: Самая критичная safety property для production agents. Без EOS: LLM decides 'refund $500', tool execution начата → crash → restart → LLM re-decides 'refund $500' → second refund. $1000 lost. С EOS (Flink 2PC reused): (1) tool execution prepared (e.g. Kafka transaction begin); (2) checkpoint barrier — agent state + tool prepared state committed; (3) tool committed (Kafka commit). Crash между 1 и 2: tool transaction rolled back, replay clean. Crash между 2 и 3: recovered transaction committed on restart. Transactional tools required (Kafka, JDBC); non-transactional (HTTP arbitrary) — at-least-once с app-level idempotency.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок 09 — раздел 'EOS semantics для tool calls'

questions.question: Production adoption Flink Agents (preview 0.2.1) — какая стратегия right?

options.text: Migrate всё на Flink Agents немедленно

Hybrid pilot strategy: existing production остаётся на mature (LangChain/LangGraph), parallel pilot на Flink Agents для один specific workflow (low risk, high volume — например simple FAQ routing). Через 6-12 месяцев оценить если 0.3+ mature для full migration. Don't bet entire system на preview tech, но также не lose 2 years — learn curve now

questions.explanation: Pragmatic adoption strategy для preview tech. 0.2.x — API breaking changes ожидаются, observability immature, community small. Полное rollout критических workflows = risk. Полное игнорирование = lose learning, можно miss что-то когда Flink Agents становится default. Optimal: (1) keep mature production tools (LangGraph/LangChain) для critical paths; (2) pilot Flink Agents на narrow scope — one specific workflow, low risk; (3) measure operational reality (recovery, scaling, EOS practical benefit); (4) when 0.3-1.0 GA — evaluate full migration с established team familiarity. Это applicable к любой emerging tech adoption.

questions.question: Flink Agents — это direct replacement для LangChain/LangGraph для всех use cases.
questions.explanation: Не replacement, complement. LangChain/LangGraph wins на: maturity (2+ years production), community size, rapid iteration, Python ecosystem depth. Flink Agents wins на: production-grade infrastructure (EOS, durability, autoscaling, observability built-in). Когда Flink Agents лучше: scale (millions events/day), money-critical tools (refunds, payments), durable state requirements. Когда LangChain лучше: prototyping, dev, smaller scale, не need EOS. Production reality 2026: use both — LangChain для most agents, Flink Agents для high-scale production-critical.
